name: bindbc-rpr
description: D bindings for AMD Radeon ProRender SDK (Apache 2.0). bindbc-style — dynamic loading via dlopen/LoadLibrary by default; opt-in static binding behind version=BindRPR_Static.

configurations.name: dynamic
configurations.comment: Default. Runtime dlopen of libRadeonProRender64.so via bindbc-loader.

configurations.name: static
configurations.comment: Direct link against libRadeonProRender64 at compile time.
